Section Title: ... > Fund profile
Content:
The First Trust Strategic Metal and Energy Equity UCITS Fund seeks capital appreciation by investing in a portfolio comprised primarily of global gold and oil companies
Section Title: ... > FTSMEAU profile
Content:
The First Trust Strategic Metal and Energy Equity UCITS Fund A (USD) (Acc) is a(n) Equity Mutual Funds (MF) seeks to invest in Extraction of natural resources sector located in Global. The First Trust fund’s base currency is USD and the share class was registered 08.02.2021 with unique ISIN - IE00BK7ZX207. Main exchange is OTC Mutual Funds and ticker symbol is FTSMEAU. The total expense ratio is 0.75%. The First Trust Strategic Metal and Energy Equity UCITS Fund A (USD) (Acc) pays dividends 0 time(s) per year.
